landing.badge: Jan Seva AI • Civic intelligence stack
landing.headline: Smart Governance
landing.sub: A production-minded grievance desk for municipalities and smart cities — text, voice, and image intake with on-device MobileNet, local rule-based NLP, JWT auth, and JSON storage.
landing.footerNote: Runs locally first • JWT auth • JSON storage • MobileNet + rules always available
landing.step1Body: Type, dictate, or photograph the issue — MobileNet highlights probable departments instantly.
landing.step2Body: Rule-based NLP detects category and urgency; summaries use the first words of your complaint — no external AI required.
landing.step3Body: Admins filter the queue, update status, and monitor Recharts analytics including monthly trends.
landing.capabilitiesSub: Everything citizens expect from a modern portal
landing.f1Desc: Capture issues through typing, in-browser speech-to-text, or a photo with on-device MobileNet cues.
landing.f2Desc: MobileNet in the browser plus deterministic keyword rules on the server — fully local classification path.
landing.f3Desc: TensorFlow.js suggests a department from the photo; the API maps labels to nine civic categories.
landing.f4Desc: Glassmorphism dashboard, admin charts, SLA-minded urgency labels, and SevaBot for citizen guidance.
landing.ctaSub: Deploy the React client to Vercel and this Express API to Render in minutes.

auth.loginHint: Use admin / admin123 for the admin workspace.
auth.loginNetwork: Cannot reach backend. Start it on http://localhost:5000
auth.signupHint: JWTs are issued instantly — no external auth vendor required for the demo.
auth.signupSuccess: Account ready — you are signed in.

dashboard.subtitle: Submit civic issues with text, voice, or photos. Jan Seva AI classifies nine departments locally — with ticket IDs, confidence, and source labels.

complaint.title: Submit a complaint
complaint.subtitle: Text (rule-based NLP), voice-to-text in-browser, and image classification with TensorFlow.js MobileNet.
complaint.voiceBrowserUnsupported: SpeechRecognition not supported in this browser.
complaint.textPlaceholder: Example: Street light is sparking near the transformer in Sector 12…
complaint.captionPlaceholder: e.g. broken road / pothole near Sector 4 — strongly improves category when the photo is unclear.
complaint.uploadHint: MobileNet runs locally in your browser; the server merges labels, caption, and filename hints — no cloud image API.
complaint.modelUnavailable: On-device image model unavailable. You can still submit; the server will use caption and filename rules.
complaint.textSuccess: Complaint submitted — category and urgency were inferred automatically.

list.empty: No complaints yet. Submit one from the form above.
list.delete404: Delete is not available on the server. Stop any old Node process on port 5000, then run npm run dev in the backend folder.
list.deleteNetwork: Cannot reach the backend. Start it on http://localhost:5000

admin.title: Admin analytics
admin.subtitle: Monitor every channel (text, voice-derived text, and image). Filter by category and status, update workflow, and view Recharts analytics.
admin.filtersHint: Narrow by category and/or status. Leave empty for the full queue.
admin.updateHint: Fast actions for the newest tickets (demo capped to six rows below for clarity).
admin.chartEmpty: No complaint data yet — charts will appear once submissions exist.

bot.welcome: Namaste! I’m SevaBot. Ask how to report complaints, track ticket IDs, or what info to include.
bot.title: SevaBot
bot.subtitle: Rule-based local assistant

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist.
